use_cases: Framework or technology selection in developer tools and project setup forms
Category or filter selection in e-commerce product browsing
Country or region selection in registration and checkout forms
Settings configuration where users pick from predefined options
ai_summary: An accessible listbox component built on Ark UI that provides a dropdown selection interface with keyboard navigation support, check indicators for selected items, and dark mode compatibility. Designed for forms and settings interfaces requiring selection from a predefined list of options.
